title: Khusela Assessment Questionnaire 2026
description: Please answer all questions below in full. This assessment covers workplace conduct, debt management, sales and customer service. GOOD LUCK!!!

questions.prompt: 1). Give two reasons it is VERY important to adhere to working hours?
2). Why is it important for a company to grant breaks and the time frame around once breaks?

3). (A) Is late coming acceptable? If yes — explain why?

(B) What step can a company take if late coming is a trend?
4). Is there a time frame that one should report to your senior, regarding absenteeism or late coming, and why?
5). Why is dress code an important factor in any organisation?
6). Is eating at your work station allowed, and why?
7). What are the consequences regarding alcohol and drug use at a work place?
8). What is your understanding regarding the term Debt Mediation?
9). Give four examples of a minor account?
10). What is meant by informal process?
11). What is meant by formal process?
12). List the documents required under Debt Mediation?
13). What is your understanding regarding the term Debt Review?
14). Give examples of major accounts?
15). List the documents required under Debt Review?
16). In order to sign up a client, the client must be?
17). List the documents required under Debt Review Removal?
18). What do you understand by the term Garnishee Order?

19). List the benefits under the following:

A) Debt Mediation (4 benefits)

B) Debt Review (4 benefits)
20). Is it important for a person to have ethics and why?
21). Does image matter and why?
22). List the manner in which one answers a company phone?
23). Why is it important for employees to reach/achieve their daily, weekly and monthly target at all times?

24). Complete the case study with calculation included:

Khusela Debt Management has a sales and direct marketing department with a staff complement of 20 agents. They have a monthly target of 500 signed closed deals.

Please confirm each agent's daily, weekly and monthly target.

Show your Calculation and state the Target for: Daily / Weekly / Monthly
25). Give a clear understanding as to why it is important for companies to process stats monthly?
26). What is your understanding when you hear the word sales?

27). Explain in your own words why clients/customers stay or leave a company?

A) Why clients/customers STAY (3)

B) Why clients/customers LEAVE (3)
28). List the four objective handling strategies?

title: Module 4: Example assessment
description: This assessment covers the core concepts of Module 4.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of France?
Explain the concept of photosynthesis in one sentence.
Discuss the impact of the Industrial Revolution on modern society.
How many matchas do you consume in a day
